questions.question: Where was the “Yoga Connect 2025 global summit” held?
questions.explanation: The Ministry of Ayush hosted the global summit ‘Yoga Connect’ on 14th June 2025 at Vigyan Bhawan, New Delhi as a key event before the 11th International Day of Yoga (IDY). It was held in a hybrid format, with over 1,000 in-person participants and virtual attendees from top yoga institutions and wellness groups worldwide. The event was coordinated by the Central Council for Research in Yoga and Naturopathy (CCRYN), India’s main yoga research body.

questions.question: Which ministry has inaugurated the Lok Samvardhan Parv in New Delhi?
questions.explanation: Minority Affairs Minister Kiren Rijiju inaugurated the Lok Samvardhan Parv at Raj Ghat in New Delhi. The event showcases key government schemes under the vision of Sabka Saath, Sabka Vikas, Sabka Vishwas, Sabka Prayas. It focuses on the economic empowerment of minority communities, especially artisans and traditional craftspeople. The event includes an exhibition-cum-sale of crafts like Laakh Bangles, Blue Pottery, Banarasi Brocade, and more.

questions.question: Surinsar-Mansar Wildlife Sanctuary is located in which state/UT?
questions.explanation: Recently, the Jammu and Kashmir Government formed a Divisional Level Committee to monitor the Eco-Sensitive Zone around the Surinsar-Mansar Wildlife Sanctuary. This sanctuary is located in the Union Territory of Jammu and Kashmir and is named after the twin lakes Surinsar and Mansar. It spreads across Jammu, Udhampur, and Samba districts, with most of it lying in Jammu district.

questions.question: What is “AviList” that was recently mentioned in news?

options.label: C
options.text: A unified global checklist of bird species for conservation

answer.label: C
answer.text: A unified global checklist of bird species for conservation

questions.explanation: Recently, AviList, the world’s first unified global checklist of bird species, was launched to support effective bird conservation. It replaces the International Ornithological Committee (IOC) and Clements lists and will be updated every year. AviList offers the most updated and reliable classification of global bird species. It is a result of global collaboration involving BirdLife International, the Cornell Lab of Ornithology, the American Ornithologists Society, the International Ornithologists’ Union, and Avibase. The list includes 11,131 bird species, 19,879 subspecies, 2,376 genera, 252 families, and 46 orders.

questions.question: Pranati Nayak won which medal in women’s vault at the Asian artistic gymnastics championships in Jecheon, Korea?
questions.explanation: Recently, Indian gymnast Pranati Nayak won her third bronze medal in the women’s vault at the Asian Artistic Gymnastics Championships held in Jecheon, Korea, on 14 June 2025. The 30-year-old scored 13.666 and 12.866 in two attempts, totaling 13.466 to secure the bronze medal. She finished behind China’s Zhang Yihan (13.650) and Vietnam’s Nguyen Thi Quynh Nhu (13.583). Pranati had earlier won medals in 2019 and 2022. Another Indian gymnast, Protistha Samanta, finished fourth with a score of 13.016.

questions.question: Where was the 137th meeting of the Offshore Security Coordination Committee (OSCC) held?
questions.explanation: The Indian Coast Guard (ICG) recently chaired the 137th meeting of the Offshore Security Coordination Committee (OSCC) in New Delhi. The committee frames policies, prepares contingency plans, and guides multiple agencies in securing offshore installations. Due to the growing offshore Oil and Natural Gas sector, the Indian Coast Guard’s role has expanded significantly. Indian Coast Guard (ICG), formed under the Coast Guard Act, 1978. It is an armed force under the Ministry of Defence.

questions.question: Extended Trajectory-Long Duration Hypersonic Cruise Missile (ET-LDHCM) is developed by which organization?
questions.explanation: India is set to test its most advanced indigenously developed missile called the Extended Trajectory-Long Duration Hypersonic Cruise Missile (ET-LDHCM). It is indigenously developed by the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) under a program named Project Vishnu. It is a long-range missile that travels at hypersonic speeds, meaning it is over five times the speed of sound. It can be launched from land, sea, or air, giving India flexible strike capabilities.

questions.question: Which institution has launched the ‘Samarth’ Incubation Program to support startups in the Telecom and ICT sector?

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

questions.explanation: The Centre for Development of Telematics (C-DOT) recently launched the ‘Samarth’ Incubation Program to support startups in the Telecom and Information and Communication Technology (ICT) sector. C-DOT is an autonomous telecom research and development institution under the Department of Telecommunications (DoT), Government of India. The program offers financial grants, advanced technical resources, and expert guidance to help startups grow from idea stage to commercial success. It focuses on building sustainable and scalable business models.

questions.question: Which tiger reserve has become the top tiger habitat in India based on ungulate population?
questions.explanation: Kanha Tiger Reserve has become the top tiger habitat in India based on ungulate population, as per a recent report by the Wildlife Institute of India (WII), Dehradun. Kanha Tiger Reserve, also known as Kanha National Park, is located in the Maikal ranges of the Satpura hills in Mandla and Balaghat districts of Madhya Pradesh. It lies in the Central Indian Highlands, which form part of India’s main peninsula.

questions.question: Sustainable Cities Integrated Pilot Approach (SCIAP) project is funded by which organization?
questions.explanation: Under the Swachh Bharat Mission-Urban (SBM-U), some cities are now using electric vehicles (EVs) for household waste collection. This move is supported by the Sustainable Cities Integrated Approach Pilot (SCIAP) Project. SCIAP was launched in 2016 to promote sustainable urban planning and management. It aligns with the goals of the United Nations Human Settlements Programme (UN-Habitat) to support India’s urban development. The project is funded by the Global Environment Facility (GEF). It is jointly implemented by the United Nations Industrial Development Organization (UNIDO), UN-Habitat, and the Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs (MoHUA).
